switchGuard: Do not replace the Objective-C/AppKit app until every required feature below is represented in the SwiftUI draft and validated against the shipping settings contract.

features.label: eye/stand independent timers
features.risk: SwiftUI draft cannot preserve independent eye and stand reminder schedules.
features.nextPort: Port eyeDueAt, standDueAt, rest state, and independent rescheduling.

features.label: seconds-level debug rhythm
features.risk: Debug rhythms such as 10 seconds would regress to minute-level settings.
features.nextPort: Port minute/second time fields and 10-second lower-bound sanitizers.

features.label: settings window
features.risk: Users would lose the current multi-page settings experience.
features.nextPort: Rebuild overview, eye, stand, display, automation, and stats pages.

features.label: overview dashboard
features.risk: The default settings page would lose current state and quick actions.
features.nextPort: Port dual timers, status band, today stats, and quick action buttons.

features.label: rest overlay yield/topmost policy
features.risk: Rest windows may again feel stuck on top or fail to yield to other apps.
features.nextPort: Port yielded state, topmost toggle, demotion, and recovery checks.

features.label: display recovery
features.risk: External display, sleep, and off-screen window recovery would regress.
features.nextPort: Port screen diagnostics, bounds repair, and recovery history.

features.label: automation policy
features.risk: Meeting, video, game, and ignored-app policies would become opaque or absent.
features.nextPort: Port policy priority, keyword editor, templates, and diagnostics.

features.label: calendar/presentation light distraction
features.risk: Calendar meetings and presentation/full-screen states would stop reducing disruption.
features.nextPort: Port EventKit checks, presentation detection, quiet hours, and action summaries.

features.label: stats backup/export
features.risk: Stats history, backup, restore, and CSV/JSON export would be lost.
features.nextPort: Port stats history schema, backup JSON, import, and CSV export.

features.label: release/update/support flow
features.risk: About, update checks, release guidance, and support bundles would regress.
features.nextPort: Port GitHub release lookup, install guide, issue bundle, and release evidence hooks.
